## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm validate`
- [ ] relevant focused tests
- [ ] docs build, if docs changed
- [ ] deployment render/smoke check, if deployment changed

## Release Notes

-

## Checklist

- [ ] Public behavior is documented.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior has a clear trust boundary.
- [ ] Schemas and fixtures are updated together, if applicable.
- [ ] CLI, HTTP, MCP, OpenAPI, and static export contracts stay aligned, if applicable.
